title: fix more swagger inconsistencies
body:
I'm getting really tired of doing this manually.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Tests green, but @cevich, in scrum you mentioned that the "rdo" test should not affect the red/green status on the github "main page". I interpreted "main page" to mean [/libpod/pulls](https://github.com/containers/libpod/pulls); but as of the time I write this, that page shows my PR with a red X:
![with a red X](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/265639/77941606-aac60400-7277-11ea-9102-8b96839395cf.png) even though "rdo" is the only failing test. Did I misunderstand what you meant by "main page"?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> but @cevich, in scrum you mentioned that the "rdo" test should not affect the red/green status on the github "main page".  

@edsantiago FYI, naw, I was referring to the magic permalink [icon in the readme](
https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/README.md):

[Continuous Integration:](contrib/cirrus/README.md) [![Build Status](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/github/containers/libpod.svg)](https://cirrus-ci.com/github/containers/libpod/master)

That only reflects the status from Cirrus-CI, which doesn't include RDO.  Though it's still red because of all the post-merge flakes :confounded:
